remarks: Welcome to 6 Nottingham Drive, a spacious and well-maintained rental located in Stamford's highly desirable Springdale neighborhood. Offering approximately 1,960 square feet of comfortable living space, this inviting home features 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms, providing plenty of room for everyday living.  The bright and functional layout is complemented by generous living areas, creating an ideal setting for relaxing or entertaining. Enjoy the warmer months from the screened-in porch, perfect for morning coffee or evening gatherings, and step outside to the deck overlooking the property.  Conveniently situated in one of Stamford's most sought-after neighborhoods, this home offers easy access to shopping, restaurants, parks, schools, public transportation, and major commuting routes while maintaining a peaceful residential setting.  Don't miss this opportunity to enjoy spacious living in the heart of Springdale.
